message:
feat: Replace placeholder implementations with real functionality

- tupleobject.zig: Implement full pyObjectEqual comparison supporting
  int, float, string, bytes, bool, None types for tuple contains()
- runtime.zig: Implement real isSubclass/isSubclassMulti with
  PyTypeObject tp_base chain walking for proper type hierarchy checks
- plistlib.zig: Implement full XML and binary plist parsing
  - loadXML: Recursive XML element parsing for dict, array, string, int, etc.
  - loadBinary: Full binary plist format parsing with trailer, offset table,
    and object deserialization for all plist types
  - dumpBinary: Object serialization with proper binary format
- platform.zig: Improve libc_ver() to detect actual glibc version from
  builtin.os.version_range.linux.glibc and handle musl, macOS, Windows
- bdb.zig: Implement proper breakpoint condition evaluation
  - Support True/False literals
  - Support comparison operators: ==, !=, >, <, >=, <=
  - Variable lookup from frame locals
  - Numeric and string comparison
- testbuffer.zig: Implement real buffer protocol for ndarray
  - init(): Proper array initialization with shape/stride calculation
  - getitem/setitem: Byte-level access with format-aware read/write
  - AttrValue: Union type for heterogeneous dict values
